{"society_power": 6.0, "state_power": 6.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Labor federation (FOCH) and socialist party consolidate worker mobilization", "reasoning": "The rise of the FOCH, the Partido Obrero Socialista, and combative unionism\u2014despite the Santa Mar\u00eda de Iquique repression\u2014deepened autonomous associational and mobilizational capacity, lifting society; meanwhile the fragmented oligarchic Parliamentary Republic and export-dependent, unaccountable fiscal base eroded coherent state authority."}
